message:
fix(qr): implement safe Debug for RecoverySecret to prevent accidental exposure

The RecoverySecret struct contains sensitive cryptographic material.
Previously it derived Debug which would expose the raw bytes and
encoded secret if accidentally logged with {:?}.

Now implements Debug manually to redact sensitive fields:
  RecoverySecret { entropy_bits: 256, encoded: "[REDACTED]" }

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
